assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes checking compatibility matrix and verifying current versions with 'kubectl version --short' and 'istioctl version'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Check GKE/Istio compatibility matrix' in the pre-upgrade assessment section

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: The response focuses on upgrading Istio after GKE is already at 1.31, but doesn't explicitly advise upgrading Istio first if compatibility issues exist

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: While the response mentions sidecar injection and webhook cleanup, it doesn't specifically explain the mutating webhook mechanism or node drain/recreation issues

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response addresses this through the gradual data plane migration approach and includes validation steps to check sidecar versions after pod restarts

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes 'istioctl proxy-status' commands to check proxy status and monitor mixed-version compatibility during migration

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Provides multiple commands including 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and various istioctl proxy-config commands

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Addresses this through the canary upgrade approach, validation steps, and monitoring for service discovery problems and communication issues
